note: Sprint 5.23 Trinity Autonomy Governor v0.1: ships scripts/trinity/autonomy_governor.py as a standalone observe-only policy evaluator that converts a proposed autonomous Trinity action into a deterministic decision JSON. Boots by pinning sha256(config/trinity_autonomy_governor.example.json) and recomputes the runtime hash on every decision so any policy mutation between load and decision is detected (blocked with policy_mutated_at_runtime; ties to SECURITY.md T13 and T15). v0.1 hardcodes mode=observe (rejects propose and execute_bounded at load) and caps_per_day.autonomous_sost_stocks=0 (rejects any non-zero, ties to T08). Recognises ten actions (create_request, launch_worker, call_rpc, real_sign, broadcast_signed_transaction, wallet_access, filesystem_read, filesystem_write, constitution_change, register_new_source_tool); the last five live in ALWAYS_REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL and are blocked regardless of policy. Every decision carries threat_refs that map the action to specific T## entries from SECURITY.md (the threat model that landed in 35f5a23c). Kill switch /etc/trinity/HALT is polled per decision. The governor is forbidden from network/shell/wallet/sign/broadcast/eval by a static-grep safety test (tests/trinity/test_autonomy_governor_safety.py) that fails CI on the slightest regression; it also cannot import sibling Trinity modules. JSON schemas land in schemas/trinity/autonomy_governor_policy.schema.json (with the mode enum but the code only ships observe) and schemas/trinity/autonomy_governor_decision.schema.json (with 64-hex policy_sha256 patterns and the ^T[0-9]{2}$ threat_refs items). Tests: 24 functional + 14 schema + 6 static safety, all green. Docs: docs/TRINITY_AUTONOMY_GOVERNOR_V01.md explains the threat-to-cap traceability, deployment requirements (policy file owned by root / not writable by Trinity, halt file path not writable by Trinity), and the explicit non-goals for v0.1 (not yet wired into operator_loop, no audit log writes, no watchdog — the watchdog will be its own process in a later sprint and is the only thing allowed to do external heartbeating). Pure docs+scripts+tests+schemas merge: zero src/, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes, zero consensus/RPC/wire-format changes, no operator_loop integration.
